questions.q: According to a study featured in Scientific American on April 30, 2026, researchers were surprised to find that city birds appear to be more afraid of whom?
An MIT study published on April 30, 2026, revealed that a 10% increase in female immigrants in a given U.S. metro area leads to registered nurses spending more time doing what?

Released on April 30, 2026, the 'State of the World's Fathers' report by Equimundo highlighted a global caregiving strain, revealing that what percentage of fathers say they aren't getting the parenting support they need?
